nameEn: Mosque of al-Malik al-Salih on Roda
whyCandidateMatters: Mosque of al-Malik al-Salih on Roda would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Ayyubid layer in Roda Island through a mosque rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
knownResearchGaps: Confirm a direct monument-specific institutional or academic source.
Validate current identity, coordinates, and survival condition.
Verify a reusable documentary image and its exact license.
